patch:
--- a/synchronous_counter_32bit.v
+++ b/synchronous_counter_32bit.v
@@ -1,14 +1,14 @@
 module synchronous_counter_32bit (
   input clk,
   input reset_n,
   input enable,
   output reg [31:0] count
 );
-  always @(posedge clk) begin
+  always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin
     if (~reset_n) begin
       count <= 32'b0;
     end else if (enable) begin
       count <= count + 1;
     end
   end
 endmodule
before_code:
module synchronous_counter_32bit (
  input clk,
  input reset_n,
  input enable,
  output reg [31:0] count
);
  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (~reset_n) begin
      count <= 32'b0;
    end else if (enable) begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end
endmodule
after_code:
module synchronous_counter_32bit (
  input clk,
  input reset_n,
  input enable,
  output reg [31:0] count
);
  always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin
    if (~reset_n) begin
      count <= 32'b0;
    end else if (enable) begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end
endmodule
